detail: Audited unified adjusted OHLCV store root and price directory checked.
Price parquet files are the only price input for this gate.
Required fields are date, ticker, adj_close, volume.
Search universe and price files should align.
Validation candidate tickers should remain inside the eligible universe.
Eligible tickers should cover the limited MVE2 common window.
Non-positive adjusted prices are not acceptable for formal design.
Non-positive volume is a liquidity quality warning.
Duplicate date-ticker rows are not acceptable.
Daily adjusted-return absolute jump threshold is 50%.
Flags tickers with at least five consecutive zero or missing volume rows.
Audit CSV rows disagree with readable price parquet rows.
The gate uses only audited store plus limited MVE2 outputs; formal v9 and v8.2 baseline outputs are excluded.
